subject: Incorrect Charge on My Hiver Account
body: Hi Hiver team, I'm writing to dispute a charge on my recent bill. The amount is higher than expected and I think there might have been an error. My account ID is ACCT_1234 and the plan is Growth. Please help me resolve this ASAP. The order ID is #ORD_5678.

subject: Question About Hiver Billing Cycle
body: Hello, I recently upgraded to the Pro plan and I'm not sure when my next bill is due. Can you please inform me about the billing cycle for my account? My ticket ID is TK_9012 and I've received an error message 'Payment method not found'.
key_facts: Error message: Payment method not found

subject: Unauthorized Charge on My Credit Card
body: To whom it may concern, I've just noticed an unauthorized charge from Hiver on my credit card statement. The amount is $99.99 and the transaction ID is #TRX_1111. This is outrageous and I demand a refund immediately. My Hiver account ID is ACCT_5678.

subject: Help with Downgrading My Hiver Plan
body: Hi Hiver support, I hope you can help me with downgrading my plan from Enterprise to Business. I've reviewed my usage and I think the lower plan will suffice. The order ID for my current plan is #ORD_3333 and my account ID is ACCT_9012. Thanks in advance for your assistance!

subject: Refund for Hiver Team Plan
body: I'm writing to request a refund for my Hiver Team Plan subscription. I was charged $50 on January 1st, but the 'automation' feature I needed isn't working due to a '504 Gateway Timeout' error. I've tried reaching out to support multiple times but haven't received a solution. My order ID is #HIV-00123. I'd appreciate it if you could process the refund as soon as possible.

subject: Unacceptable Experience - Refund Needed
body: I'm extremely dissatisfied with Hiver's service. The ' reports' feature on my Hiver Business Plan doesn't work as advertised, and I've been getting a 'Failed to load data' error consistently. Despite multiple support tickets, the issue remains unresolved. My ticket ID is #TKT-00987. I demand a full refund for my $200 monthly subscription. If I don't hear back from you within the next 48 hours, I'll be forced to take further action.

Hello, I'm reaching out to request a refund for my Hiver Starter Plan. I initially signed up for the trial, but it automatically converted to a paid subscription. However, I realized that I don't need the features offered in the plan. My order ID is #HIV-04567, and I was charged $20 on February 15th. Could you please assist me with the refund process?
subject: Refund for Unwanted Subscription
Refund and Cancellation Request
body: Hi Hiver team, I hope you're doing well. I've been using the Hiver Enterprise Plan for a few months now, but unfortunately, my team's needs have changed, and we no longer require the service. I'd like to request a refund for the remaining period of my subscription and cancel my account. My ticket ID is #TKT-01234, and I've been charged $500 per month. I appreciate your help in this matter, and I'm looking forward to hearing back from you soon.

subject: Error when assigning tasks in Hiver
body: I'm on the Premium plan and I've been getting an error when trying to assign tasks to my team members in Hiver. It says 'Failed to assign task: invalid recipient'. I've tried multiple times but it doesn't work. This is really slowing down our workflow.
key_facts: Error message: 'Failed to assign task: invalid recipient'

subject: Hiver not syncing with Gmail
body: Hi, I'm on the Business plan and I've noticed that Hiver isn't syncing with my Gmail inbox. I've checked the settings and everything looks fine. Could you please help me troubleshoot this issue? I've tried restarting the sync but it still doesn't work.

subject: Hiver is causing duplicate emails
body: I'm extremely disappointed with the service I'm getting from Hiver. On my Enterprise plan, I'm getting duplicate emails in my shared inbox. This is causing a lot of confusion and extra work for my team. I've tried to contact support before but I haven't gotten a satisfactory response. Please fix this ASAP.

subject: Issue with Hiver's reporting feature
body: Hi, I'm using the Growth plan and I'm having some issues with the reporting feature in Hiver. When I try to generate a report, I get an error message saying 'Data not available'. I've checked the documentation but I couldn't find a solution. Could you please help me figure out what's going on?

subject: Unacceptable Service with Hiver
body: I am writing to express my extreme dissatisfaction with Hiver's service. Despite paying for the Premium plan, I've been experiencing constant disruptions. The 'Failed to sync' error is still not resolved after multiple reports. This is unacceptable for a tool that promises seamless shared inbox management.

subject: Frustrating Experience with Hiver's Support
body: I've been trying to get help from Hiver's support team for days, but it's been a nightmare. My team is on the Enterprise plan, and we're facing issues with email assignment. The error 'Assignment failed: unknown user' keeps popping up. I need this resolved ASAP to avoid further disruption to our workflow.

subject: Concerns with Hiver's Performance
body: I'm reaching out because my team and I are experiencing some performance issues with Hiver. We're currently on the Starter plan, but the 'Loading...' screen often hangs indefinitely. We've tried troubleshooting, but nothing seems to work. I'd appreciate it if you could look into this and provide a solution.

subject: Unresolved Issue with Hiver's Integration
body: I am extremely disappointed in the level of support I've received from Hiver. My team is on the Business plan, and we've been struggling with integration issues. The 'Authentication failed' error persists, despite following the troubleshooting guide. I expect a prompt resolution to this issue to prevent further losses.

subject: Hiver Features Inquiry
body: Hi Hiver Support, I'm reaching out to inquire about features available on the Growth Plan. Specifically, I'd like to know if automated workflows and custom reporting are included. Looking forward to your response.

subject: Error with Email Templates
body: I'm trying to use email templates on my Hiver account, but I keep getting an 'invalid template formatting' error. I've checked the help docs, but can't find anything helpful. Can someone please assist me with this issue?

subject: Upgrading to Enterprise Plan
body: Hi Hiver team, I'm interested in upgrading my account to the Enterprise Plan. Can you please let me know what additional features I'll have access to, specifically regarding advanced analytics and integrations? Thanks in advance for your help!

subject: Missing Features on Pro Plan
body: I've been using Hiver's Pro Plan for a while now, but I'm extremely disappointed to find out that it doesn't include bulk email sending. This is a crucial feature for my business, and I was never informed that it wasn't available. Can someone please explain why this feature is missing and what I can do to get it?

subject: Can't access my Hiver account
body: I've been trying to log in to my Hiver account for hours, but I keep getting the error 'Invalid credentials'. I know my password is correct. Please help me regain access ASAP. My team is waiting on me to respond to urgent emails.

subject: Account access query
body: Hi, I just wanted to check if it's possible to add another user to our Hiver account. We've recently expanded our team and need to give them access to our shared inbox. Looking forward to hearing back from you.

subject: Locked out of my account
body: I'm extremely disappointed in the service I've received from Hiver. I've been locked out of my account for days and despite multiple attempts to reset my password, I've had no success. This is unacceptable and I demand that this issue is resolved immediately.
key_facts: Error message: Account locked due to excessive login attempts

subject: Question about account credentials
body: Hi, I'm trying to set up Hiver for my team and I had a question about account credentials. Can you please let me know if it's possible to use Google Authentication to log in to our Hiver account? If so, are there any specific steps I need to take to set it up?
